title: 2025-11-14 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 12.52
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-11-14: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 12.52/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-11-14, the score printed 12.52/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
